Dragonborn.name: Draconic Ancestry
Dragonborn.description: Choose a dragon type that determines your Breath Weapon damage type and Damage Resistance.

Dragonborn.name: Breath Weapon
Dragonborn.description: Replace an attack with magical energy in a 15-ft cone or 30-ft line, dealing 1d10 damage (scales with level).

Dragonborn.name: Damage Resistance
Dragonborn.description: Gain resistance to damage type matching your chosen draconic ancestry.

Dragonborn.name: Darkvision
Dragonborn.description: See in darkness up to 60 feet.

Dragonborn.name: Draconic Flight
Dragonborn.description: At level 5, gain temporary flight for 10 minutes as a bonus action (once per long rest).

Dwarf.name: Darkvision
Dwarf.description: See in darkness up to 120 feet.

Dwarf.name: Dwarven Resilience
Dwarf.description: Gain poison damage resistance and advantage on poison condition saves.

Dwarf.name: Dwarven Toughness
Dwarf.description: Hit point maximum increases by 1, plus 1 per level gained.

Dwarf.name: Stonecunning
Dwarf.description: Bonus action to gain tremorsense 60 feet on stone surfaces (limited uses per proficiency bonus).

Elf.name: Darkvision
Elf.description: See in darkness up to 60 feet.

Elf.name: Elven Lineage
Elf.description: Choose Drow, High Elf, or Wood Elf lineage granting cantrips and leveled spells at levels 1, 3, and 5.

Elf.name: Fey Ancestry
Elf.description: Advantage on saving throws against the charmed condition.

Elf.name: Keen Senses
Elf.description: Proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival.

Elf.name: Trance
Elf.description: Don't sleep; complete long rest in 4 hours of meditation while retaining consciousness.

Gnome.name: Darkvision
Gnome.description: See in darkness up to 60 feet.

Gnome.name: Gnomish Cunning
Gnome.description: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws.

Gnome.name: Gnomish Lineage
Gnome.description: Choose Forest or Rock Gnome subtype with distinct cantrips and spell abilities.

Goliath.name: Giant Ancestry
Goliath.description: Select one supernatural benefit from cloud, fire, frost, hill, stone, or storm giant heritage (limited uses).

Goliath.name: Large Form
Goliath.description: At level 5, transform to Large size as bonus action for 10 minutes, gaining advantage on Strength checks.

Goliath.name: Powerful Build
Goliath.description: Advantage on checks to end grappled condition; count as larger for carrying capacity.

Halfling.name: Brave
Halfling.description: Advantage on saving throws against the frightened condition.

Halfling.name: Halfling Nimbleness
Halfling.description: Move through spaces of creatures larger than you.

Halfling.name: Luck
Halfling.description: Reroll d20 when you initially roll a 1 and use the new result.

Halfling.name: Naturally Stealthy
Halfling.description: Take Hide action while obscured only by creatures at least one size larger.

Human.name: Resourceful
Human.description: Gain Heroic Inspiration upon completing a long rest.

Human.name: Skillful
Human.description: Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

Human.name: Versatile
Human.description: Gain an origin feat of your choice.

Orc.name: Adrenaline Rush
Orc.description: Take Dash as bonus action, gaining temporary HP equal to proficiency bonus (limited uses).

Orc.name: Darkvision
Orc.description: See in darkness up to 120 feet.

Orc.name: Relentless Endurance
Orc.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed, drop to 1 HP instead (once per long rest).

Tiefling.name: Darkvision
Tiefling.description: See in darkness up to 60 feet.

Tiefling.name: Fiendish Legacy
Tiefling.description: Choose abyssal, chthonic, or infernal legacy granting damage resistance, cantrips, and leveled spells.

Tiefling.name: Otherworldly Presence
Tiefling.description: Know the Thaumaturgy cantrip using your fiendish legacy spellcasting ability.

Aasimar.name: Celestial Resistance
Aasimar.description: Resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage.

Aasimar.name: Darkvision
Aasimar.description: See in darkness up to 60 feet.

Aasimar.name: Healing Hands
Aasimar.description: Touch a creature to restore HP equal to 1d4 per proficiency bonus (limited uses).

Aasimar.name: Light Bearer
Aasimar.description: Know the Light cantrip, using CHA as spellcasting ability.

Aasimar.name: Celestial Revelation
Aasimar.description: At level 3, choose a transformation (Heavenly Wings, Inner Radiance, or Necrotic Shroud) as bonus action for 1 minute.
